creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Requesting the creation of an email alias for Wiki Admin Team, with the following details:

Alias: wiki-admin@
Recipients: gavin, remko, linimon, theraven, koobs

This alias will be listed on the FreeBSD Project Administration and Management page [1], as the default-assignee for Wiki issues in Bugzilla, and for internal/external communication

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/administration.html
